fluid_transfer: Transfer fluid via the syringe on the lab table.
pencil_insertion: Insert wooden pencil into sharpener on table.
test_tube_collection: Pick up test tubes and put them in the rack.
whiteboard_erasing: Wipe the whiteboard to erase all text.
hex_key_insertion: Insert hex key into the block.
moving_cup: Move the cup from left to right.
moving_tape: Move the tape from left to right.
peg_insertion: Insert the peg into the white hole.
